programme.desc: More family heirlooms are restored, including a watch hidden in the original owner's dress while she was a PoW, and a Louis Vuitton trunk that has seen better days

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find, fix and flog unwanted possessions on behalf of their owners. Henry and Simon realise profit potential in an old crop sprayer, a cast iron fire guard and some old wooden workshop clamps

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard's never-ending hunt temporarily concludes at a pub filled with quirky antiques in Winchester, Hampshire, and makes a controversial purchase elsewhere in the county

programme.title: Scrap Kings
programme.desc: Nye Phillips and his team are in Northamptonshire to demolish an old school. Plus, blacksmith Kev uses scrap materials to create a river-dwelling sculpture.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer hopes to tap into 1990s nostalgia by working on an 1994 Mitsubishi 3000GT VR-4, but restoring the vehicle to its original state proves harder than expected

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Dirt Dogs take on the biggest gamble of their career, and the Gold Gypsies tear into an all-or-nothing final mission. Meanwhile, Rick digs deep to save his season

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard and Tee John head on their first road trip to France, visiting a 16th-century chateau in the Loire region. Plus, they stop at the antique markets of Montsoreau and Viarme

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam are in Oxfordshire to rummage through a collection of vintage tractors and automobiles. They find a Suzuki SB200 and paraffin dispenser

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: In Devon, Henry and Sam are on a mission to buy automobilia for a client's man cave. The guys uncover a 1937 petrol pump and a pricey tyre inflator.

programme.title: Massive Engineering Mistakes
programme.desc: In Florida, homes are swallowed whole as a giant sinkhole opens up. And in the Netherlands, why did a brand-new airport parking garage suddenly collapse?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How volcanos contribute to the production of guacamole and the development of trucks capable of crossing swamps. Plus, the method used to produce the world-famous Fiskars scissors brand

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The production of steel cables capable of supporting a 50,000-ton bridge, why modern hunters still use medieval weaponry and the systems involved in determining the correct quantities of clothing sizes to stock

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike Brewer and Ant Anstead work on a 1964 Falcon Ranchero, one of the first utility vehicles, but this particular example is suffering under a coat of cheap black paint

programme.title: Supercar Superbuild
programme.desc: An in-depth insight into the mechanical capabilities and basic building processes behind BMW's distinctive Mini range

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Paul Teutul Sr arranges for work to be done on the shop in exchange for building custom bikes for the contractors

programme.title: Extreme Car Hoarders
programme.desc: Chuck and Rick discover a haul of American classics, including Impalas and Chevelles, so attempt to persuade Edd to part with some of his hoard to build his dream pick-up

programme.title: Mega Shippers
programme.desc: In Shoreham, 5000 tons of biomass are being shipped to power plants in Sweden. And in King's Lynn, the old power station receives a new gas turbine shipped in from Germany

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Developments in the manufacture of cufflinks, dashboards, blueberry turnovers and earthenware pottery

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The development and manufacturing processes behind the creation of pharmaceutical blister packs, deli slicers and weather vanes

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: The return of the programme that provides an insight into the world of high-end pawnbroking. In Sheffield, London Road owner Dan Hatfield and his sister Cherise are trying to seal the deal on some expensive luxury luggage, as well as a collection of rare 18th-century intaglios and a football shirt signed by former England player Paul Gascoigne. At Nikolas Patrick in London, brothers Charlie and Patrick Devine deliver a shock when valuing a luxury watch

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: At Nikolas Patrick in London, Charlie and Patrick consider buying a statue of Napoleon and it's heads versus hearts for a deal on a thoroughbred racehorse. At London Road in Sheffield, Dan and his assistant Ellie look at a collection of curious antiques and are stunned by a sparkling diamond ring

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: Charlie and Patrick try to do deals on a pair of Michael Jackson autographs and a limited edition turntable, while two luxury pens and a gold pocket watch could help save a dog home from closure. Elsewhere, Dan and assistant Shelwa are befuddled by a 3D printer and are faced with a watch which may help pay for some university fees

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: At Pickwick Pawnbrokers in south-east London, Nathan and Debs consider a stamp collection that may contain a hidden gem, while in Sheffield, Dan is stumped over a rare watch and tries to put together a deal on a £250,000 Ferrari in just 24 hours

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: In Sheffield, Dan tries to get to grips with a room-sized antique music player, and also looks at a guitar signed by pop star Noel Gallagher. At Pickwick in south-east London, Nathan and Debs consider doing deals on some charm bracelets full of precious memories and a luxury lighter originally bought for a jaw-dropping 4,000 euros

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to West Nyack, New York, to come to the aid of a family-run Mexican restaurant that is suffering a financial crisis, and a case of hard-headed patriarchy. When the chef arrives he finds himself turfing out the existing customers for their own safety due to a cockroach infestation on the premises

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Competitive golf-loving couple Lynn and Mike from Southampton have been holidaying in Spain for 40 years and even lived there previously. They love it so much they now wish to now buy a holiday home there, so Danni Menzies lines up five options for their £60,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bill Hughes and Lorraine Roberts are selling up in Manchester to embark on a new adventure and retirement in the central region of Andalusia in Spain. Jasmine Harman tries to assist them in finding a suitable property priced within their £130,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman is on the Greek island of Crete, showing five properties to childhood sweethearts Catherine and Patrick from Leeds. They've been married for over 20 years and cannot wait to enjoy extended holidays in Crete in a property which can also accommodate their two teenage sons. Jasmine shows them five properties for their £150,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Tracey and Dean met in their early twenties and have devoted their lives to raising their family, including their own three children and two foster children. Now that they are finally in a position to buy a holiday home in the Mar Menor in Spain, Jasmine Harman is on hand to show them five properties for their £70,000 budget

programme.title: Royals Declassified
programme.desc: Recently declassified documents reveal an unseen side to the Queen and Prince Philip, exploring the key personal events that have shaped their public and family lives. The programme examines the end of Philip's high-flying naval career and clashes with the palace old guard, Princess Margaret's turbulent love life, and Prince Charles being bullied at school, and questions the personal price the Queen paid in her approach to each fresh challenge

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A 10-year-old Dobermann is treated for an aggressive bone tumour in its leg. One option is a full limb amputation, but another could potentially save Rolo's leg by cutting out the affected part of the bone and replacing it with a unique implant of Noel's own invention - a scapula-humeral endoprosthesis. Five-year-old labrador Jeff is suffering from developmental elbow disease, which cannot be managed by medication alone. The day of his planned surgery for a full elbow replacement arrives, though bad news places the prospect of such treatment in jeopardy

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits South Boulevard, a Korean-inspired restaurant in Little Rock, Arkansas. Owner Jermaine opened it a year before to serve a Korean menu in a tribute to his mother but is now $200,000 in debt and needs help turning things around

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Six new teams enter the kitchen and for their first challenge they must produce two different types of miniature classics, the lemon meringue pie and the tiramisu - 24 perfect examples of each in three and a half hours. After that judges Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden ask them to take the humble fruit crumble and transform it into a fine-dining showpiece, complete with towering, edible sculptures. Presented by Tom Allen and Liam Charles

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Part one of two. Veteran actors and married couple Prunella Scales and Timothy West pass the tiller to Sheila Hancock and Gyles Brandreth, who are celebrating 40 years of friendship by making new memories together and learning new skills. Sheila and Gyles learn the ropes with Tim, and set out by themselves along the upper reaches of the River Thames. It's the same river that roars past their homes in London, but just 50 miles upstream it's an Arcadian paradise of unspoiled nature, royal retreats and river regattas

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Greg and Georgie who are taking on the highly ambitious task of converting a dilapidated, 35-year-old barn in Kent. The build will be a huge challenge involving the painstaking conservation of the existing rotten structure, building a new two-storey internal steel frame and recycling everything they can to stretch their £250,000 budget

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back at some of the best, most memorable offers they have made. Claire and Matt are looking for a quirky old home with open-plan living and are not afraid of a project, while Sadie and Simon have sold their home so they need a new place pronto - but bungalows in Bath are not easy to find. Rich and Bethan have missed out on two properties in 12 months, and their desire for chocolate box perfection is stronger than ever

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: The journalist and doctor asks five people to put their lives in his hands as he attempts to turn their health around in just 21 days. As the volunteers enter the last week of the experiment, Michael explores how alterations to eating patterns and exercise can do wonders for stress levels. He helps the group members explore their inner motivation before they tackle the final fitness challenge. He also reveals to them how far they've come in 21 days - with some astonishing results

programme.title: Cook Clever, Waste Less with Prue & Rupy
programme.desc: Prue Leith and Dr Rupy Aujla help two busy doctors from Manchester with three children, coming up with a menu that will please everyone and reduce waste. Recipes include a simple chicken and cauliflower traybake, rice pudding that makes use of leftover rice, and a hack that turns an old bag of salad into a mouth-watering salsa verde

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the White Horse Inn in Maldon, Essex, where owners Jayne and Pete Kocinoga hope their attention to detail will win over their guests

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Sussex, the first hosts are childhood sweethearts Robin and Maria. Robin is the brains behind the cooking, but it's up to Maria to ensure the hosting is spot on. Sasha and Leslie are next, and Sasha soon reveals her apparent royal 'connection'. On the last night, Karl and Michael think they are in with a chance of nabbing the £1,000 prize, so long as they can keep their bickering at bay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman is on the Greek island of Crete, showing five properties to childhood sweethearts Catherine and Patrick from Leeds. They've been married for over 20 years and cannot wait to enjoy extended holidays in Crete in a property which can also accommodate their two teenage sons. Jasmine shows them five properties for their £150,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Martin and Michelle MacClay from Wiltshire have long dreamed of having a holiday home in France to escape from their busy lives along with their 13-year-old daughter Caitlin. They have chosen the Loire Valley as their perfect location because of its landscapes, rivers, historic chateaux and wonderful food. Scarlette Douglas sets out to help them find a property on a budget of £73,000.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Laura Hamilton helps Rodney and Lynda Palliser from Hertfordshire search for their dream holiday home near the upmarket, cosmopolitan city of Palma - the capital of Majorca - on a budget of £100,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charity manager Andrew Batsford hosts the first of a week of parties from Hastings, aiming to inspire his fellow contestants with a menu of dishes prepared using foraged ingredients, including sea broccoli and stinging nettles. However, if the food fails to win them over, he hopes a dynamic Wham!-themed evening of festivities will do the trick

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second day of the competition in Hastings, East Sussex, and retired solicitor Adrian Carter is hoping to impress his guests with a Moroccan-themed evening. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

Charity manager Andrew Batsford explains how the principles of anarchism and punk can be applied to football, while retired solicitor Adrian Carter dresses as the 19th-century statesman Otto von Bismarck and raises eyebrows with his jokes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Kate Eadon hosts the fourth dinner party in Hastings, East Sussex, with a menu styled on a gourmet pub meal. Adrian Carter gets himself in hot water, Sally-Anne Keller reveals a surprise celebrity crush, and the host recounts her own encounter with a famous funnyman

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The confident Stelios Michael hosts the final night in Hastings, East Sussex, hoping to impress his guests with a Greek-inspired evening. The diners get involved when they receive a masterclass in the country's traditional dance, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Deon and Dave met in 2011 through the dating pages of a newspaper, and bonded over their shared love of the great outdoors and exploring different cultures. With a budget of £40,000, they're looking for somewhere bursting with Spanish character and charm and have Ben Hillman on hand to show them just how far their budget will stretch in the rural region of Jaen, Andalusia

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps sisters Kay and Faye realise their dream of buying a home in Cannes, lining up five fantastic properties for them on their budget of £400,000

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Architect George Clarke delves into the world of small builds, meeting people taking tiny, unpromising spaces and creating innovative and exciting places to live, work and play. In the fourth episode of this ninth season, George is amazed by a couple's plan to turn a coach into a mobile home, complete with a garage for their treasured Mini. He also meets a pilot who has created a garden den from a small plane. Elsewhere, George's observatory build takes him to one of the world's largest telescopes

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: On the frontline with the South Yorkshire police as they deal with an increasing numbers of non-emergency cases. A man reports an assault in progress, but when police arrive they find him in a drunk and drugged state and hoping for a lift home. What surprises them most, however, is when he asks them to go pick up his cannabis stash first. In Sheffield city centre, officers help a confused elderly woman suffering from dementia who cannot find her way home

programme.title: In the Footsteps of Killers
programme.desc: Emilia Fox and criminologist Professor David Wilson investigate famous unsolved murder cases, continuing with the disappearance of Suzy Lamplugh. The estate agent vanished after making an appointment with a client in July 1986. Despite the high profile of the case, nobody has ever been charged with Lamplugh's abduction and murder. Following a series of tantalising clues, Emilia and David narrow the field of suspects down to just one man. Will he reveal the truth?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kicking off the competition in Edinburgh are young lovebirds Andy and Pim, who are hoping to impress their guests with a Scottish and Thai-themed menu - with a bit of American thrown in for good measure. On the second night, the group learns more about Jimmy and Jas's fairy-tale first encounter, as well as Jimmy's fledgling modelling career, which surprises everyone. Night three sees a bromance between Andy and Stuart blossom, and everyone needs an open mind when they sample plumber Stuart and hairdresser Jack's experimental menu

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Competitive golf-loving couple Lynn and Mike from Southampton have been holidaying in Spain for 40 years and even lived there previously. They love it so much they now wish to now buy a holiday home there, so Danni Menzies lines up five options for their £60,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gary Fitzpatrick and Shahine Korimbocus want a holiday home in the tranquil Limousin area of France where they can enjoy an outdoor lifestyle with their 20-month-old twins Charlie and Catherine, and Gary's son Dominic. Brought up with French culture in Mauritius, Shahine wants the children to share her enjoyment of it, and to pick up the language. With a budget of £88,000, Scarlette Douglas sets out to help the family find their perfect house

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps good friends Mike Dawson and Louise Clark search for a holiday apartment in the resort of Sitges, near Barcelona, on a budget of £170,000. Louise is hoping for somewhere to escape with her two-year-old daughter, while Mike is looking to make the first step in a potentially permanent move

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: NHS manager Helen Mather holds the first party in Leicester, hoping her plans for a simple menu will allow her more time to entertain her guests. However, the accident-prone host has a mishap involving raw pig's blood, and tries to turn the evening around with some 'urban ballet' after one diner sours the mood with a display of less-than-polite table manners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Terry Robinson hosts the second dinner party in Leicester with a 'Dress as Your Hero' theme, and the Elton John fan also decides to treat his guests to a song. He is confident his menu will score him top marks, but while Richard is blown away, Ryan remains unimpressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty spa manager Porchia Lee hosts the third dinner party in Leicester, serving up a French-themed menu of chicken liver pate, pan-fried chicken with tarragon sauce and creme brulee. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: IT enthusiast Ryan Bruce hosts the fourth dinner party in Leicester, and tries to impress his guests with a Spanish-inspired menu cooked in front of them. Entertainment is provided by Ryan's sister, West End actress Charlie Bruce, who puts the contestants through their paces in a salsa lesson

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Double-glazing salesman Richard Deeping hosts the final dinner party in Leicester, and hopes to make up for his boisterous behaviour by impressing the guests with his culinary prowess. In a bid to land higher scores, he puts on his own brand of entertainment, only to reveal a little too much of himself in the process, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels across the United States in search of restaurants in dire need of renovation - and after analysing their situation, he has just 24 hours to bring them back from the brink of disaster. His first stop is the New York community of Congers, where he hopes to save family-run Italian restaurant Bella Gianna's. Gordon and his team work round the clock to clean the premises, remodel the interior and revamp the menu, while also teaching the staff to prepare new dishes and work together as an efficient unit. What will the customers think of the new-look restaurant?

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie has big plans to give her ground-floor apartment in her chateau's east wing a Renaissance revival, but support from Gerry and mother Isabelle turns out to be more of a hindrance than help. Sarah and George secure their first wedding booking and prepare to woo the couple as they visit the chateau for a planning meeting. Debbie and Nigel start renovating their chateau's salon, but need to down tools quickly as they get an unexpected last-minute booking

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Karen and Julian run a B&B in Cornwall and although they've never been to Naxos, they've decided it's the perfect place for a holiday home. Scarlette Douglas sets out to help them find the perfect pad on a budget of £215,000

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: The head gardener at Cornwall's Lost Gardens of Heligan sows the seeds of a wildflower revolution from a colourful crop of meadow flowers to help the rest of the county bloom. An engineer gets a replica of iconic locomotive the Puffing Devil back up to full steam, and a Devon wildlife ranger takes care of wild beavers

Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden judge their efforts

programme.title: Cocoon: The Return (1988)
programme.desc: Three elderly couples return to Earth five years after leaving to retire on a distant planet, surprising their families, who assumed they were dead. Several of their alien friends have come back with them to recover members of their own race left behind in cocoons on the ocean floor, one of whom has been abducted by a government research institute. Sci-fi sequel, with Wilford Brimley, Don Ameche, Steve Guttenberg and Jessica Tandy

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Make You Laugh Out Loud
programme.desc: Compilation of internet videos, including cats playing musical instruments, dressed in costumes and riding on vacuum cleaners, as well as introducing felines so famous they have their own Hollywood agents. The programme also features the owners who dream up the ideas for these online films, and bloggers who have made a fortune cashing in on their popularity, while behaviour experts are on hand to analyse and explain the physiological characteristics of the pets. Narrated by Iain Lee, with commentary by Susan Calman

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House Changed My Life
programme.desc: Revisiting a selection of swaps to see what impact the programme has had on the people featured, beginning with two families who appeared a year ago. The Gowlands were counting every penny, while millionaire property developers the Greens lived in luxury and for one week they traded home and budgets

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious
programme.desc: Only the world's richest can possibly afford a super yacht, but it is not the price tag that makes these extravagant vessels exceptional, it is the luxurious details. Here, members of the billionaire Haidar family display their 52-metre floating palace, where a 13-strong staff attends to their every need. Plus, cameras sneak a peek behind the scenes as a charter yacht is prepared for a group of wealthy Americans and follow Becki Milton, private yacht shopper to the super-rich, as she finds the ultimate getaway for three secretive celebs

programme.title: Fred and Rose West: The Search for the Victims
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary examining the crimes of the couple, revealing the true horror of what took place behind closed doors at 25 Cromwell Street and other addresses in Gloucester over the course of many years. The programme looks at recent police efforts to find the body of Mary Bastholm and tells her story, as well those of the 12 other young women known to have been murdered by Fred and Rose West

programme.title: Wild Things (1998)
programme.desc: A high-school counsellor is accused of rape by a student whose advances he spurned - and unfortunately for him, one of her peers backs up her story. Thriller, starring Neve Campbell, Denise Richards, Matt Dillon, Kevin Bacon, Theresa Russell, Robert Wagner and Bill Murray

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The crimes of serial killer Trevor Hardy - the so-called 'Beast of Manchester' - who murdered three teenage girls in the mid-1970s. Despite being arrested after the second killing, Hardy was freed on the basis of an alibi he had arranged with his then-partner

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: The true crime series returns with the case of pharmacist Mitesh Patel. In 2018 he called police to tell them he had returned home to find his wife, Jessica, murdered. However, it was all a lie. Within weeks, Mitesh's double life as a gay man had become apparent to the police. Far from being a committed husband and pillar of the Hindu community, he had been plotting an affair with his lover in Australia

programme.title: Dirty John
programme.desc: Once he is out of hospital, John gets clean for Debra as her family begin to freeze her out. Flashbacks reveal some of John's family past

programme.desc: Part one of two. The pressure is on as The Irreplaceables and the ALDC go head to head at competition for the first time. US reality series about the world of competitive dance

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: The programme follows Graham, a pest controller who battles critters, bugs and vermin across the Costa del Sol, as he goes on a snake hunt and is called to an ant infestation. Plus, a pair of Welsh ex-pats who moved to Spain to run a bar, and the so-called 'cat lady of the Costa del Sol', who feeds more than 100 street cats as well as taking them to the vets to be neutered

programme.title: Cats and Dogs at War
programme.desc: Animal experts Chirag Patel and Nanci Creedon help families whose fighting pets have turned their homes into a battlefield

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Derbyshire's Road Crime Unit uses intelligence and surveillance tactics to crack down on suspected drug dealers. The team receives some intelligence about a man suspected of ferrying drugs into the county using a relative's car. After boxing the car to a stop, a struggle breaks out between the driver and road crime cop Nick Lovatt, and the suspect is forcibly cuffed and detained

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Karl is called to an accident involving a driver in his seventies who has reversed into a house and ruptured a gas main. With the elderly man trapped in his car, it's a full-scale emergency for Karl and his colleagues to free the driver and prevent an explosion. On the outskirts of Derby, traffic cop Jason is called to a mystery crash involving a middle-aged woman who has rolled her car on a quiet suburban street. Unsure why or how the accident has occurred, Jason is left gobsmacked when the truth is revealed

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drug dealer who has been driving dangerously reveals a surprising amount of information when he is pulled over, and friends try to baffle the pursuit team by changing their names. Meanwhile, an officer has a shock in store for a law-breaking driver

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Two known offenders end up in trouble again after a high-speed chase. An encounter with a gang of hoodies leads to a close shave for one officer, another goes in pursuit of a four-legged fugitive, and a Lamborghini turns out to be not all it seems

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Two known offenders end up in trouble again after a high-speed chase. An encounter with a gang of hoodies leads to a close shave for one officer, another goes in pursuit of a four-legged fugitive, and a Lamborghini turns out to be not all it seems

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve dog behavioural problems, using his experience to find quick but long-lasting solutions. He meets Allana, whose two Labradors Teddy and Fudge pull her along at break-neck speed when out walking. He then visits Peggy, a cross-breed with a penchant for escaping, no matter how much her owners try to keep her penned in. Finally, Graeme heads to Blackpool, where Stanley the terrier has been struggling ever since his best friend Sweep died

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Sheila blames Sheila C for Levi's heartache. Bea says goodbye to Ramsay Street and embarks on a new adventure. Yashvi is shell shocked after hearing a recording

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Nikau tries to gloss over the problems caused by his kiss with Allegra. Mackenzie tries to get a rise out of Dean, but he remains steadfast

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Avril and Andrew Wilson-Rankin, who have dreamt of owning their own home since they first met 10 years previously. The couple have a budget of 260,000 euros to transform a two-storey disused commercial lock-up on a side street in Dun Laoghaire, Dublin, into an urban dwelling complete with exposed brickwork, and internal bridge and a mezzanine level. However, the logistical challenge of working on a restricted site quickly puts the budget and tight schedule under pressure

programme.title: Dream Kitchens and Bathrooms with Mark Millar
programme.desc: The DIY expert comes to the aid of homeowners who are transforming the most important rooms in the house. He begins by helping to create a modern luxury dream kitchen for £50,000 in Glasgow, and a rainforest-themed bathroom for £5,000 in Sutton Coldfield

programme.title: Fred and Rose West: The Search for the Victims
programme.desc: Part two of two. Documentary examining the crimes of the couple, revealing the true horror of what took place behind closed doors at 25 Cromwell Street and other addresses in Gloucester over the course of many years. Featuring witness testimony from those closest to the victims and rarely seen archive footage. The programme also looks at recent police efforts to find the body of Mary Bastholm and tells her story, as well those of the 12 other young women known to have been murdered by Fred and Rose West

programme.title: Fritzl: Surviving Evil
programme.desc: The case of the Austrian man Josef Fritzl, who kept his daughter prisoner for 24 years in the cellar of his house, until she was released in 2008 at the age of 42. Dramatically pleading guilty to all of the charges at the last moment of the trial, he was sentenced to life in a secure unit for incest, imprisonment, raping the victim - who bore seven children - and causing the death of one child by neglect

programme.title: Sarah Payne: 5 Mistakes That Caught a Killer
programme.desc: Examining the murder of Sarah Payne, an eight-year-old girl who was killed by Roy Whiting in 2000, and the mistakes he made that led to him being arrested and locked up for life. The programme features interviews with detectives, forensic experts and other crucial witnesses, charting the police investigation and the evidence that led them to her killer

programme.title: Adults Only
programme.desc: People making a living from selling sex, including a couple who run their burgeoning porn film business from their house in Southend while also looking after their children, and a 70 -year-old dominatrix working from a dungeon in her semi-detached house in Swindon

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Documentary taking a look at some of the most terrifying disasters in recent history, from horrifying dramas at sea to one of the worst air disasters in British aviation history, using eye witness testimony and footage taken by those involved telling the human stories behind the events. A cruise ship sailing off the coast of Norway is caught in a dangerous storm, and a passenger witnesses the casing of an airplane engine being ripped off mid-flight

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. In Hammersmith, west London, camera operators help police as they try to enforce a drinking ban on a local park and spot a group whose members may be about to break into a shop

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: West Midlander Vince rushes to get his new bar ready, having mistakenly thought he was paying for a working bar when it turns out he had actually just bought the lease on the building - leaving him to do the rest himself. Meanwhile, former dancer Bambi plans a racy show to raise cash for a local dog rescue shelter, and Andy tours the coast buying and selling old furniture

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: The Fiddes family from Royal Wootton Bassett rank in the top 10 per cent of Britain's wealthy, and live in a six-bedroom home paid for by husband Matt's chain of martial arts centres. For the four-strong Leamon family, who are among the nation's poorest 10 per cent, the swap means leaving their four-bedroom terrace on a Southampton council estate, and enjoying a weekly budget of £1,500 instead of their usual £170

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Documenting the exploits of waste enforcers as they battle to keep Britain tidy. Featuring a tsunami of effluent in Hampshire, sewer safety and a wet wipe wild goose chase

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A scooter is driven the wrong way down a dual carriageway into oncoming traffic, but despite it having its tyres stung and being followed by a police helicopter, it proves incredibly difficult to apprehend the rider. A chase nearly ends in serious injury for an officer when he is almost dragged along by a car after it is cornered in a supermarket car park

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers stop a driver in relation to an alleged drunken assault and the breathalyser indicates he is more than three times over the limit and two knives are found in his car. Scott is patrolling Peak District villages and responds to a call in from a member of the public about two men acting suspiciously, soon coming across a white van towing an expensive trailer

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: An officer is nearly run over by a desperate driver, and another's patience is tested by a drunken motorist. Plus, a law enforcer goes in search of a suspicious character, and a group of youths tries to deceive the interception unit

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A helicopter is used in the pursuit of an armed robber, ending in a serious accident. A sniffer dog makes a discovery, a fraudster is taken into custody and a gang of lorry thieves is pursued in a major manhunt. Plus, new recruits at South Yorkshire's Road Crime Unit are put to the test by a pair of suspected burglars

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team closes in on a suspected petrol thief, stops a motorist with a stash of suspicious goods in his boot, and tracks a motorist who heads to the fair after ditching his car. The police also have an appointment with a drink-driver who crashed into a doctor's surgery, and the owner of an uninsured car tests the officers' patience to the limit

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall tries to help the owners of Bella the collie in Sheffield, whose aggression has become so extreme that people can no longer visit the house and the family cannot take the pet out in public. Graeme also meets Toby, a stroppy basset hound that enjoys sitting on the kitchen counter, and Dave, the French bulldog with a penchant for eating its own droppings

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Levi, Harlow and Yashvi commiserate over their relationship woes. Yashvi initiates a serious discussion with Ned, hoping to resolve their issues

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Though Nikau and Bella continue to chafe against Sienna's manipulative ways, the money is too good to turn down. Dean learns Tane and Ziggy have moved in together

programme.title: 10 Years Younger in 10 Days
programme.desc: Cherry Healey and the team help two woman desperate for a fresh start and dramatic transformations. Widow Jackie was left disabled after a skiing accident, while single mum Charlotte's life and looks have taken a back seat to caring for her four kids and managing their health conditions

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: From endless food and drink to hotels with kids' clubs and water parks, going all-inclusive is supposed to be all about hassle-free fun in the sun. But for some, this option proves anything but relaxing. Here cameras follow the unlucky holidaymakers whose breaks went horribly wrong. They include nurse Julia Vaughan, who spent more than £5,500 on a relaxing break in Crete for herself and her family, only to be confronted by a giant construction site next to their hotel

programme.title: The Clues That Caught the Killer
programme.desc: Documentary examining the vital breakthroughs that helped police catch the killers of 60-year-old Sadie Hartley, who was immobilised with a stun gun and stabbed to death in her own home in January 2016. Detectives quickly identified two suspects, but only patient and thorough police work could uncover the evidence to secure a conviction

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: The case of a disabled man who formed a close relationship with his carer and her son, a situation they exploited to ultimately murderous ends

programme.title: The Hunger Games (2012)
programme.desc: A totalitarian future holds an annual nationally televised event in which two children from each of its regions fight to the death until only one remains. A teenage girl takes her younger sister's place in the games and must pit her wits against the deadly combat skills of her rivals. Sci-fi adventure based on Suzanne Collins' novel, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Woody Harrelson and Elizabeth Banks

Sci-fi adventure based on Suzanne Collins' novel, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Josh Hutcherson, Woody Harrelson and Elizabeth Banks

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary about gypsies fighting to keep their traditions alive and the locals trying to ban them. Traveller Tony dreams of a new life for his family so he has set up a sunbed business with millionaire non-traveller Colin. However, the neighbours have got a court order to prevent him setting up the company. Margaret, a single mother of seven, just needs a roof over her head after being evicted, while Simey Connors prepares a grand funeral for his brother Mikey, a legend in the traveller community

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: At Holiday Resort Unity in Somerset, there's a surprise in store for soft play worker Lauren as Covid-19 restrictions are lifted and venues are reopened - and entertainment chief Chunkie Russell is finally allowed to welcome the guests into the main entertainment venue RJs. Meanwhile, at Tencreek Holiday Park in Looe, a flash flood causes chaos in the kitchen - and the Knowles family from Manchester embark on their annual crabbing competition

programme.title: Columbo: Playback (1975)
programme.desc: An inventor tries to stop his mother-in-law from exposing his infidelities by murdering her in front of a security camera - and tampering with the recording to make it look like the killing occurred at a time when he had an alibi. However, Columbo sees through his hi-tech ruse and tries to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Oskar Werner and Gena Rowlands

programme.title: Columbo: Make Me a Perfect Murder (1978)
programme.desc: A TV executive's assistant responds to being denied a promotion by killing her boss, then uses her years of experience working on detective shows to create the perfect cover-up. But she reckons without the intervention of Columbo, who begins laying his trap for her while also nursing a neck injury. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Trish Van Devere

programme.title: Columbo: The Greenhouse Jungle (1972)
programme.desc: A penniless rare-plant collector, desperate for funds to support his expensive hobby, fakes his nephew's kidnapping to get his hands on a trust fund. However, the supposed victim turns up dead, prompting Columbo to take action to unmask the killer. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Bradford Dillman and Ray Milland

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp

programme.title: Columbo: Double Shock (1973)
programme.desc: A wealthy man due to marry a younger woman is electrocuted in the bath. Columbo suspects the victim's identical twin nephews - a flamboyant TV chef and a conservative banker - who stand to inherit his fortune if he died unmarried, but the detective is unsure which of them is the guilty party. Drama, starring Peter Falk, and Martin Landau in a dual role. With Paul Stewart, Julie Newmar and Jeanette Nolan

programme.title: Columbo: The Conspirators (1978)
programme.desc: A terrorist posing as an Irish author heads a peace organization while secretly running guns for the IRA in Belfast. When he kills an arms dealer who tried to swindle him, the writer is sure he has covered his tracks - until Columbo shambles on to the scene. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Clive Revill, Jeanette Nolan and Bernard Behrens

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber

programme.title: Columbo: A Friend in Deed (1974)
programme.desc: A Californian police commissioner helps a rich, influential friend to conceal his complicity in murdering his own wife - but reckons without detective Columbo's timely intervention and his dogged determination to bring the truth to light. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Richard Kiley and Rosemary Murphy

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when Libby Parker is followed home by a gang of teenagers, and raped in the courtyard of her apartment block. Hundreds of windows overlooked the scene of the crime, but not one of the residents who witnessed the attack called the police. The prosecutors face an even more difficult dilemma when it emerges none of Libby's neighbours are willing to make a statement either. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Notorious serial killer Gregory Williams Yeats concocts an elaborate plan to free himself from incarceration by co-operating with one-time nemesis Dr Carl Rudnick. When the pair ultimately break out of prison, Chicago detectives Lindsay and Dawson head to New York on the trail of fugitives, and the SVU team is enlisted to help bring the pair back to justice. The first of a two-part cross-over episode with Chicago PD, guest starring Sophia Bush and Jon Seda

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murder of a dentist leads Goren and Eames to a company at the heart of a criminal conspiracy involving contaminated mouthwash that has caused the deaths of several children. Establishing a motive for the killing proves difficult - and the detectives begin to suspect they are being manipulated by someone close to the investigation. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A boy is kidnapped from his home, and the team discovers this could be the latest in a series of child abductions in the area

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A pop star's sister is abducted from a sold-out concert - leaving the team with a huge crowd of suspects

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica goes to New Orleans to appear on a chat show, but is sidetracked into solving the death of a famous jazz musician murdered while performing on stage. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A taxi driver and an admiral working at the Pentagon are found executed by the side of a road, but the agents have trouble ascertaining a motive - until they uncover links to a woman searching for her missing husband, a political refugee from Africa. Meanwhile, McGee makes a discovery about his new girlfriend. Starring Sean Murray, Michael Weatherly and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby babysits a bright nine-year-old while the other members of the team try to locate the youngster's missing father - a survivalist wanted in connection with a case of robbery and murder. The search takes them deep into the wilderness - where a startling discovery awaits. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green comes under investigation by Internal Affairs after he shoots a suspect, and the case reveals a host of secrets the detective would rather keep hidden, threatening not only his police career but his freedom. Jesse L Martin stars, alongside S Epatha Merkerson and Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A novelist's apparent suicide becomes a murder case, with the evidence leading Lupo and his new partner Kevin Bernard to suspect a secretive religious group. Award-winning police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis and Briscoe question a disabled boy's bereaved family in an attempt to establish whether his death was a mercy killing or cold-blooded murder, and discover his mother is not as respectable as she makes herself out to be. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murder of memoir writer Sweetie Ness. Clues initially lead them to suspect his stalker, agent and a groupie, but after digging deeper into the victim's past, they begin to consider the possibility he was not who he claimed to be

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's murder leads Lupo and Bernard to learn she was secretly in conflict with her husband, going against his desire that their family lead an environmentally friendly life. The case is complicated further when a dead passenger and drugs turn up in the car she was using, with the complexity continuing in the courtroom as Cutter suspects someone has been tampering with evidence. Guest starring Ned Beatty (Deliverance) and Sherry Stringfield (ER)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A narcotics detective plans a major drugs sting but makes the mistake of illegally using a teenager as bait - with fatal consequences. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A traumatised marine escapes from a psychiatric unit, convinced he is still fighting in Iraq. The agents believe his erratic behaviour indicates post-traumatic stress disorder and try to calmly talk him round before restraining him. However, blood tests reveal high levels of steroids in his system - meaning someone is using him as a human lab rat. Starring Lauren Holly, Sean Murray and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Muslim US Marine is found seemingly shot dead near a mosque that has been linked to an al-Qaeda recruiter. Ducky refuses to perform an autopsy out of respect for the man's religion, but Abby runs tests that reveal his demise was actually due to poisoning from a rare octopus venom. Meanwhile, McGee goes into the mosque intending to plant a concealed microphone - but discovers someone has had the same idea

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team set up a stake-out at a storage facility to catch a thief suspected of selling hi-tech Navy equipment on the black market, but end up witnessing a murder. To make matters worse, $90million worth of radar gear goes missing while they are distracted. Meanwhile, Ducky asks Abby to run a series of mysterious blood tests, raising suspicions that he is harbouring a secret

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After NCIS finds a secret government bank account that appears to be funding a nationwide network of vigilante justice, the team must determine who is acting as judge and jury. Mark Harmon, Sean Murray and David McCallum star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An aspiring author is murdered, setting in motion an investigation full of unexpected twists and turns. The victim's criminal boyfriend seems a likely suspect, but proves to have a rock-solid alibi - and inquiries later lead Goren and Eames to a celebrated writer whose career has gone into decline. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Coyote, with Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Falacci investigate the murder of a grand jury witness, and uncover serious flaws in the case against a group of American footballers accused of rape. As inquiries proceed, suspicion falls on the motives of an ambitious Bronx assistant DA and his wife, who have a lot riding on the outcome of the trial. Crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Alicia Witt

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The New York police drama returns for its tenth and final series. A woman is found shot dead two days after attending a party thrown by fashion designer Nyle Brite. A search of her home uncovers a large selection of wigs, condoms and clothes by the designer, plus a number of nasty text messages on her phone, leading the team to wonder whether she moonlighted as a high-class prostitute. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are called out to an apparent suicide, but come to different initial conclusions as to whether Theresa Esperna actually killed herself or was murdered. Further investigation reveals that she worked at a bank whose only client was the Catholic Church and her specific role was to manage the trust fund set up to pay compensation settlements in sexual abuse cases involving priests. Crime drama, starring Kathryn Erbe and Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: The task force investigates when a couple disappears from a remote mountain campsite

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A boy is attacked and abducted from the car park of a basketball court

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera

Elsewhere, the helicopter team coordinates a risky game of cat-and-mouse as police chase a group of graffiti artists across live train tracks in a patch of industrial wasteland in Battersea. The episode also looks at the case of the Hounslow Slasher, a man who in 2012 randomly attacked lone women while they were travelling home at night. Nick Wallis presents

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Muslim US Marine is found seemingly shot dead near a mosque that has been linked to an al-Qaeda recruiter. Ducky refuses to perform an autopsy out of respect for the man's religion, but Abby runs tests that reveal his demise was actually due to poisoning from a rare octopus venom. Meanwhile, McGee goes into the mosque intending to plant a concealed microphone - but discovers someone has had the same idea

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team set up a stake-out at a storage facility to catch a thief suspected of selling hi-tech Navy equipment on the black market, but end up witnessing a murder. To make matters worse, $90million worth of radar gear goes missing while they are distracted. Meanwhile, Ducky asks Abby to run a series of mysterious blood tests, raising suspicions that he is harbouring a secret

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A legal-aid strike leads first to murder, and then to Rubirosa pitting her wits against Cutter as the ADA tries to bring a case against a pro golfer accused of the killing of a paralegal. American legal drama, starring Alana De La Garza and Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the world of online romance when a garage mechanic is murdered, but the case takes a series of bizarre turns before they are able to identify the killer. Police drama, starring Anthony Anderson and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A female cop is found stabbed to death in a park alongside a Hispanic male with a near-fatal gunshot wound. Further investigations lead Briscoe and Curtis to a girl who suffered a tough childhood in the care of an abusive father and drug-addicted mother, and her alibi appears to be flimsy at best. Robert Vaughn guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when lawyers Fred and Lizzy Bellamy are found murdered in their sleep. The case leads them to two couples who are in the process of adopting children from Haiti, but the detectives uncover signs of abuse that point to a human-trafficking ring

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate when a plaintiff involved in a high-profile lawsuit against airline Pan World is found dead in his car. The detectives soon discover the case had been delayed after the presiding judge was murdered and the clues lead to a lawyer willing to do anything for money

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis and Briscoe investigate after a child in day care is injected with a fatal disease. They uncover a medical scandal of frightening proportions, and the child's own father comes under suspicion. Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A suspect in a drug-smuggling case is seemingly mauled to death by his own dog, which is immediately scheduled to be destroyed - but Abby refuses to hand it over to Navy officials and launches her own investigation. Meanwhile, Gibbs continues to worry about Shepard's health, convinced she and Ducky are hiding something. Drama, starring Pauley Perrette, Mark Harmon and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are investigated by the FBI on suspicion of murdering arms dealer La Grenouille. Jenny Shepard is the prime suspect, as she believed the criminal killed her father some years earlier, so Gibbs forms a plan to help his boss. However, an eyewitness later comes forward and implicates Tony. Starring Lauren Holly and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Marine is seemingly killed in a mortar attack on America's heavily fortified administrative HQ in Baghdad, but a subsequent autopsy reveals he was murdered. Intelligence analyst Nikki Jardine volunteers to help Tony investigate the case - but her behaviour in Iraq makes him suspect she had an ulterior motive for requesting the assignment

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives delve into the personal and working relationships of Goren's long-standing adversary Nicole Wallace and her lover as they search for the jewel thief who murdered her accomplice. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Olivia d'Abo

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren infiltrates the psychiatric ward of a New York jail, without the knowledge of his superiors, to investigate disturbing allegations by his inmate nephew that prisoners are being systematically abused, tortured and even killed by sadistic guards. Drama, starring Vincent d'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: While investigating the execution-style killing of three college students on a basketball court, Logan struggles to understand what appears to be a motiveless triple murder. At a loss to identify a reason for the shooting, he must rely on the testimony of a survivor of the attack if he is to bring the killers to justice

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A programmer working for a defence contractor's cyberwarfare department falls to his death from an apartment building. Goren and Eames discover he was a hacker secretly employed by a rival company under a false identity, and a woman claiming to be a friend of the victim says they were actually on a mission to destroy both businesses. Guest starring Michael Kelly (House of Cards) and Jeri Ryan (Body of Proof)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent

programme.title: UK Border Force
programme.desc: Documentary series taking viewers inside the UK Border Agency, revealing the work that takes place behind the scenes of the immigration process. Teams at Heathrow Terminal 3, Calais, Dover and across the North West and North East of England reveal the methods and technology used to allow legitimate visitors safe passage while catching those who try to gain illegal entry to the UK

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programme.desc: While some engineering students carry out an unusual experiment, officers find a construction worker's story has no foundations

programme.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A meteor strike leaves Jack stranded on a primitive planet with little chance of being rescued - until Teal'c intervenes

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The expedition becomes stranded in space after escaping an Asuran weapons satellite, but there is only 24 hours' worth of power left when the hyperdrive unexpectedly shuts down. The city must fend off attacks from natural enemies as it drifts in space

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data experiments with his emotions by pursuing a romantic liaison with Ensign Jenna Anaya _ and discovers he has a lot to learn about human relationships. Brent Spiner stars

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The ship is sent by Starfleet Command to assist a freight vessel that has been targeted by Nausicaan pirates, but its crew members flatly reject Archer's offer of help and vow to exact revenge on their attackers - no matter what the repercussions. Starring Scott Bakula

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Alien delegates from the Gamma Quadrant prefer gambling in the bar to negotiation - and Quark's attempts to cheat them leave him playing a deadly game with the senior officers' lives. Starring Armin Shimerman, Avery Brooks and Nana Visitor

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett helps his sister Mary spy on her neighbours, while the team investigates the murders of a car-share driver and his passenger. Plus, Junior escorts Tani to a wedding

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Ned falls in love with a young dancer, and Melinda tries to uncover the secret past of the girl's family. Paranormal drama, starring Christoph Sanders

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Grandview Hospital is plunged into madness when a ghost haunts a patient, and Melinda uncovers a family secret. Starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: Presenter Fred Dinenage reflects on the story of Ruth Ellis, who was found guilty of the murder of her estranged lover. She was hanged for the offence in 1955, the last woman to suffer such a fate in the United Kingdom

programme.title: The Force: North East

programme.title: Police Force: Australia

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Part one of two. Worf is forced to decide between family honour and loyalty to the Federation as civil war threatens to tear apart the Klingon empire. Sci-fi drama, starring Patrick Stewart, Michael Dorn and Tony Todd

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer invites a group of aliens, who have set out on a pilgrimage to a protostar, to come on board the Enterprise. All is well until he discovers his old enemy Silik is among the party and must be prevented from altering the future for the worse. Sci-fi drama, starring Scott Bakula

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bartender Quark is chosen to succeed the Grand Nagus Zek of the Ferengi people, a position carrying great wealth and influence - and the constant risk of assassination

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Fugitive hacker Aaron Wright resurfaces to ask for help when his co-workers at the NSA are murdered. Junior speaks at the parole hearing of the drunk driver who killed his sister

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Anthropology professor Avery Grant is stalked by a mysterious ghost, prompting Ned to step in to solve the problem. However, when he tries to use a Ouija board to determine the spirit's identity, he only succeeds in making the situation worse. Paranormal drama, starring Christoph Sanders

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: In the 100th episode of the paranormal drama, Melinda is contacted by a ghost with news that a bomb has gone missing from a hidden munitions dump. The spirit warns her that the thief intends to use the device to kill someone, and urges her to locate it before disaster strikes. Directed by and starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: The Force: Manchester

programme.title: Police Force: Australia
programme.desc: The cops hunt for a felon who has skipped bail. Meanwhile, there's a burglary at a gated retirement village, and a group of fraudsters are busted during a house search

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Get the latest news every evening about what is happening around the globe

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community. Viewers join us live on YouTube and Twitter to interact with Femi Oke and guests.

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary resolves to end his excursions back to the 1940s and spend more time with Yvonne - then realises he might have married Phoebe and returns to discover the truth. Starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Michelle Holmes and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary returns to 1940 following an ultimatum from Yvonne, and Ron forges wartime money so his friend can make a killing on the stock exchange. Starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: London's Screen Archives Presents
programme.desc: A special compilation of historical short films themed around games from Film London's London Screen Archives.

programme.title: On the Up
programme.desc: Ruth refuses to go to Stephanie's school open day, so Tony takes his household staff instead. Mrs Wembley acquires an admirer - and a partner in the kitchen

programme.title: Doctor in the House (1954)
programme.desc: A medical student is taken under the wing of three roguish colleagues who lead him astray into a series of pranks and amorous escapades that succeed in infuriating the dictatorial chief surgeon. Comedy based on the novel by Richard Gordon, starring Dirk Bogarde, Kenneth More, James Robertson Justice and Donald Sinden

programme.title: Saturday Night Revue (1937)
programme.desc: A singer performs regularly in a small Soho club with her piano player boyfriend. She discovers that her father, who works for a recording company, will be coming to see them perform - but he has got the address of a far more exclusive establishment. The couple pull out all the stops to get themselves on the bill. Musical, starring Billy Milton and Sally Gray

programme.title: Far from the Madding Crowd (1967)
programme.desc: A beautiful woman arouses the ardour of three rival suitors in 19th-century rural Dorset and, having flirted and toyed with their affections, she chooses to marry a caddish, gambling soldier - a decision that leads to a sequence of harrowing events. John Schlesinger's adaptation of Thomas Hardy's classic novel, with Julie Christie, Alan Bates, Terence Stamp and Peter Finch

programme.title: Golden Years (2016)
programme.desc: A retired couple face a grim future after a financial crisis costs them both their pensions. Refusing to take the situation lying down, they resolve to take back what is rightfully theirs with a series of daring bank robberies. Comedy, starring Bernard Hill, Virginia McKenna, Simon Callow and Sue Johnston

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The armoured divisions visit Canada for a mock battle, in which conditions are exactly as expected during a war - except lasers are used instead of live ammunition. Back in London, the trainee troopers don their breastplates as the ceremonial season begins, and prepare to guard the Queen for the first time

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Adrian Edmondson returns to his birthplace of Yorkshire to document a summer in the life of the Dales, meeting the people who live there all year round. Sixteen-year-old Phillip Mellin talks about running his family's farm alongside his mother, following the death of his father last year, while vet Neil Roberts is called out to an emergency calving

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Farmer Alex Wilkes takes her small herd of dairy cows to compete at the Great Yorkshire Show in Harrogate, and Adrian Edmondson meets Tom Orde-Powlett, who is the heir to the historic Bolton Castle in Wensleydale. Plus, 16-year-old Phillip Mellin tries to shear sheep for the first time

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Four children with a taste for adventure investigate a strange mystery in between lashings of ginger beer during a trip to the country. Spoof of Enid Blyton's Famous Five books that first launched the comedy series, starring Peter Richardson, Adrian Edmondson, Jennifer Saunders and Dawn French

programme.title: Brakes (2016)
programme.desc: Comedy outlining the seemingly random and fragile nature of the connections that can lead to people becoming part of a couple, showing the final stages of a number of relationships then flashing back to how they got together. Starring Julian Barratt, Kerry Fox and Paul McGann

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Comedy series from the pen of Men Behaving Badly creator Simon Nye, following the trials and triumphs faced by the staff of Hamway's Hardware, a traditional DIY store manned by best friends Mike and Kenny, manager Rex and student Steve. A customer's suicide attempt convinces Mike he must try to be nicer to the clientele and Julie from the local cafe sets Steve up on a blind date. Starring Martin Freeman, with Peter Serafinowicz, Ken Morley, Ryan Cartwright and Ella Kenion

programme.title: Whatever Love Means ()
programme.desc: Drama chronicling the passionate relationship between Prince Charles and Camilla Parker Bowles prior to his marriage to Diana, Princess of Wales, in 1981. The film recreates the couple's first meeting at a polo match in 1971 and reveals how the confident 23-year-old Camilla Shand made a lasting impression on the prince. Although their friendship was fuelled by a shared sense of humour, Camilla's on-off affair with Andrew Parker Bowles meant there could be no future for them as man and wife. Camilla even suggested potential suitors as the pressure grew for the heir to the throne to find a suitable partner. Starring Laurence Fox, Olivia Poulet, Richard Johnson and Michelle Duncan

programme.desc: A teacher arrives at a new school, and is appalled to discover his teenage students are receiving no sex education. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.desc: India v New Zealand. Coverage of the fourth day of the World Test Championship Final from The Ageas Bowl, Southampton. India have won 17 of their last 20 test series since 2015, with one of their series defeats coming against New Zealand in 2020. The last time these two sides met was in early 2020 when the Kiwi's won a two-match series in New Zealand, comprehensively beating their opponents 2-0.
